## Description
A clear description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behavior
What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior
What actually happened. Include any error messages from the terminal.

- Python version (`python3 --version`):
- How Python was installed (python.org / Homebrew / other):

## Screenshots
If applicable, add screenshots to help explain the problem.
